tasks.description: Build a final list of tickers to keep, drop, and replace based on evidence-driven improvements.

subtasks.description: Produce final list of weak tickers to drop, strong ones to keep, and note allocation adjustments or tickers for up/downsize.
Summarize rationale for each removal or adjustment based on performance, risk, exposure, or factor evidence.

observations: Tool 'update_task_status' returned: {'success': True, 'task_id': '3', 'status': 'completed'}

tasks.description: Screen and select new candidate stocks/ETFs to replace dropped tickers, with at least 3 data-driven screener runs.

subtasks.description: Call stock_screener with fundamental/relevant constraints (risk-adjusted, low correlation, sector/industry balance) and limit to 3-4 constraints per run (1/3).
Repeat stock_screener run with alternative constraints (2/3).
Repeat stock_screener run with focus on ETFs (3/3).
Select top candidates from screener outputs that best improve portfolio quality and fit desired exposures.

tasks.description: Construct the new/optimized portfolio and document all changes.

subtasks.description: Define proposed allocations and positions for all tickers in the optimized portfolio (JSON format).
Log the full new portfolio and changes (added/removed/adjusted with rationale) to episodic_remember.
Output the optimized portfolio according to the required JSON format, including detailed changes and rationale.

tasks.description: Run full analytics and iterative tests to validate and fine-tune the optimized portfolio until it meets all user preferences and constraints.

subtasks.description: Call calculate_portfolio_performance with the new portfolio_dict to obtain Sharpe, Sortino, and alpha metrics.

Call calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix, portfolio_exposure_calculator, and calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index, all with new portfolio_dict, to ensure correlation, exposure, and beta targets are met.
Iteratively adjust allocations and repeat analytics if targets are not satisfied.
Conclude and record final portfolio setup for output.

tasks.description: Formatting Task: Ensure plan output is in strict JSON with 'portfolio' and 'changes' sections, matching specification and including detailed rationale in the 'changes' objects.

subtasks.description: Format and output the new portfolio and changes as required: strict JSON, rationale for each change, and summary closure.

execution_history.reason: Completed summarizing current portfolio strengths (APP, SLVR, PLTR, NRG, AVGO, NVDA, BSX, GREK, etc. due to high risk-adjusted/alpha profiles), and weaknesses (IIPR, FR, STAG, TRNO, EQIX due to low/negative Sharpe, alpha, high drawdown, value lag). Factor tilts demonstrate high quality, but negative value and volatility exposure. Portfolio is momentum/growth neutral, emphasizing further optimization on momentum, value, and diversification.

observations: Strong tickers (high Sharpe, alpha, risk-adjusted return, or very strong momentum): APP (Sharpe 2.12, ann_return 2.89, alpha 1.10), SLVR (Sharpe 2.57, alpha 1.01), PLTR (Sharpe 2.00, alpha 0.90), SGDM (Sharpe 1.60, alpha 0.40), NRG (Sharpe 1.73), AVGO (Sharpe 1.55, alpha 0.40), NVDA (Sharpe 1.57, alpha 0.36), BSX (Sharpe 1.49, alpha 0.17), OKLO (Sharpe 1.66, alpha 1.56), GREK, CRDO, CEG (Sharpe >1), ARM (Sharpe 1.07), EIS (Sharpe 1.69)

Weak tickers (negative Sharpe, negative alpha, high volatility/poor risk metrics, or persistent drawdown issues): IIPR (Sharpe -0.07, ann_return -0.07, alpha -0.19, max_drawdown -0.62), FR (Sharpe 0.28, alpha -0.09), TRNO (Sharpe 0.11, alpha -0.14), EQIX (Sharpe 0.18, alpha -0.11), STAG (Sharpe 0.19, alpha -0.10), FUFU (high annualized vol 16.9, despite high alpha, return is dominated by volatility and drawdown), DGNX (Sharpe 1.8 but drawdown -0.94 indicating massive risk), EMQQ (Sharpe 0.89 but weak supporting alpha/quality), VCSH, IGSB (Sharpe ~1, but tactical/hedge allocation, not alpha drivers).

Factor tilts: Portfolio is strongly quality tilted (long quality +0.24, net +0.23), with slight negative growth and value tilt, and moderate negative volatility tilt (-0.13 net). Momentum nearly neutral. Portfolio strengths: alpha potential is high with select tickers, quality is dominant, but weaknesses come from select real-estate/REIT names and speculative plays with major drawdowns or low alpha.

execution_history.reason: Analyzed correlations and stress test results: Major risk clusters in industrial REITs, semiconductors, speculative tech; concentration in top 10 positions. Weakest/riskiest tickers confirmed by stress, drawdown, correlation, and crisis alpha/beta evidence. Defensive exposures are limited and concentrated. Full long exposure confirmed.

observations: High correlation clusters: Industrial REITs (FR|TRNO|STAG, corr 0.8+), tech semis (AVGO|MU|NVDA|ARM, often corr >0.5), select macro-sensitive tickers (AVGO, ARM, NVDA, MTSI, MU, PLTR, CRDO) have high betas and moderate/high correlation, increasing systemic risk.

Main stress test risks: Extreme drawdowns in macro, rate, and credit shocks, especially in semiconductors, speculative tech, and cannabis/industrial REIT segments; several tickers (CRDO, ARM, DGNX, OKLO) exhibit very high drawdown and beta in crises.
Net exposure: 0.93 (fully long, nearly fully allocated). Gross exposure matches. Top 10 positions = ~62% allocation (moderately concentrated).

Persistent underperformance/tail risk: DGNX, FR, IIPR, EQIX, STAG, TRNO (low/neg Sharpe, high drawdown, weak crisis performance). Portfolio also suffers from sector and style crowding (tech, growth, high beta, semis, industrial REITs).
Portfolio's defensive hedges (IGSB, VCSH, multi-utilities) are correctly small. Most defensive names (WEC, CMS) also exhibit very high pairwise correlation.
